title: USA Today: USCIS Green Card Announcement Spurs Confusion. What to Know | Fragomen, Del Rey, Bernsen & Loewy LLP

## USA Today: USCIS Green Card Announcement Spurs Confusion. What to Know

Recent USCIS guidance on adjustment of status applications is raising questions for individuals and employers navigating the green card process. In an article published in USA Today , Partner Parisa Karaahmet explained that the memo applies broadly to anyone seeking adjustment of status in the United States and highlighted that H- and L-visa holders may have a somewhat easier burden in demonstrating factors that support a favorable exercise of discretion, including compliance history, tax filings and community ties.
